title: Rahm on rejecting DP World Tour deal
content:
This video can not be played

Rahm on rejecting DP World Tour deal

Two-time major winner Jon Rahm explains his reasons for rejecting a DP World Tour deal - which has ramifications for his Ryder Cup eligibility - stating he doesn't agree with the contract the European-based tour is asking players to sign and that he "refuses to play six events".
